testcase.name: test_send_invoice_no_422

failure.message: AssertionError: unexpected 500: Internal Server Error assert (500 != 500 or 'gmail' in 'internal server error' or 'oauth' in 'internal server error' or 'refresh' in 'internal server error') + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code + and 'internal server error' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa76a8b6c940>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa76a8b6c940> = 'Internal Server Error'.lower + where 'Internal Server Error' = <Response [500]>.text + and 'internal server error' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa76a8b6ef10>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa76a8b6ef10> = 'Internal Server Error'.lower + where 'Internal Server Error' = <Response [500]>.text + and 'internal server error' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa76a8b6f320>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa76a8b6f320> = 'Internal Server Error'.lower + where 'Internal Server Error' = <Response [500]>.text

testcase.failure: tests/test_iter68_stripe_hr_certs.py:133: in test_send_invoice_no_422 assert r3.status_code != 500 or "gmail" in r3.text.lower() or "oauth" in r3.text.lower() or "refresh" in r3.text.lower(), \ E AssertionError: unexpected 500: Internal Server Error E assert (500 != 500 or 'gmail' in 'internal server error' or 'oauth' in 'internal server error' or 'refresh' in 'internal server error') E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code E + and 'internal server error' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa76a8b6c940>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa76a8b6c940> = 'Internal Server Error'.lower E + where 'Internal Server Error' = <Response [500]>.text E + and 'internal server error' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa76a8b6ef10>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa76a8b6ef10> = 'Internal Server Error'.lower E + where 'Internal Server Error' = <Response [500]>.text E + and 'internal server error' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa76a8b6f320>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa76a8b6f320> = 'Internal Server Error'.lower E + where 'Internal Server Error' = <Response [500]>.text
